# Ohio Valley Land Partners
> Cash land buyers serving the Ohio Valley plus an active Franklin County, Ohio campaign.
> We buy vacant, inherited, tax-delinquent, and landlocked land for cash.
> Close in 14–21 days. No agent fees. No commissions. Any condition.

## Core Pages
- /: Homepage — services overview, counties served, process summary
- /about: Company background, community giving commitment (5% per closing to Arc of Appalachia and Salvation Army East Palestine)
- /contact: Get a no-obligation cash offer within 24 hours

## Sell Your Land — County Pages
- /sell-land/franklin-county-oh: Cash land buyer for Franklin County / Columbus-area lots, infill parcels, and acreage
- /sell-land/belmont-county-oh: Cash land buyer in Belmont County, Ohio
- /sell-land/jefferson-county-oh: Cash land buyer in Jefferson County, Ohio
- /sell-land/columbiana-county-oh: Cash land buyer in Columbiana County, Ohio
- /sell-land/harrison-county-oh: Cash land buyer in Harrison County, Ohio
- /sell-land/carroll-county-oh: Cash land buyer in Carroll County, Ohio
- /sell-land/ohio-county-wv: Cash land buyer in Ohio County, West Virginia
- /sell-land/marshall-county-wv: Cash land buyer in Marshall County, West Virginia
- /sell-land/brooke-county-wv: Cash land buyer in Brooke County, West Virginia

## Service Area
Ohio counties: Belmont, Jefferson, Columbiana, Harrison, Carroll
West Virginia counties: Ohio County, Marshall, Brooke
Active campaign market: Franklin County, Ohio

## Key Facts
- Principal buyer — not a licensed real estate broker
- Cash offers within 24 hours of inquiry
- Closes in 14–21 days via local title company
- Handles back taxes, probate situations, landlocked parcels
- 5% of every closing donated to Arc of Appalachia and Salvation Army East Palestine Recovery
- Headquarters: 2025 Riverside Drive STE 35682, Columbus, OH 43221
- Phone: (614) 653-7430
- Email: info@ohiovalleylandpartners.com
